title: Pungent Fried Russian Chicken Kebabs
description: A show-off Russian dish featuring chicken drumsticks, deep-fried to perfection with a pungent kick. Serve with a side of steamed vegetables for a well-rounded meal.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, cornstarch, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the dish and toss to coat evenly.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few chicken drumsticks to the pan and deep-fry until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Repeat the frying process until all the chicken is cooked, adjusting the heat as needed to prevent burning.
Sprinkle the chopped fresh dill over the fried chicken and serve hot.
